title: hieracium marianum var. nudum
intro: Hieracium marianum var. nudum, commonly known as Nudum Hawk's Beard or Woolly Hawk's Beard, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Hieracium marianum var. nudum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and digestive issues.
